security.csp: default-src 'self' holo:; script-src 'self' holo: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' blob:; style-src 'self' holo: 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' holo: data: blob: https:; font-src 'self' holo: data:; connect-src 'self' holo: data: blob: https: http: ipfs: ipns: ws: wss:; worker-src 'self' holo: blob:; frame-src 'self' holo: https: blob:; media-src 'self' holo: https: blob: data:

bundle.longDescription: Hologram a sovereign, content-addressed computer. The OS boots from holo://, every byte re-derived to its address before it runs (Law L5). No Chrome, no CORS wall, a real shell + filesystem underneath.
